'''鈭歜-ch-j-ch''' ('''kabachjechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:gyp|gyp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gyp|gyp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ch-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kabachjechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachjechoko|thibachjechoko]] || [[word:jibachjechoko|jibachjechoko]] || [[word:shibachjechoko|shibachjechoko]] || [[word:kibachjechoko|kibachjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubachjechoko|thuthubachjechoko]] || [[word:jujubachjechoko|jujubachjechoko]] || [[word:shushubachjechoko|shushubachjechoko]] || [[word:kukubachjechoko|kukubachjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubachjechoko|thubachjechoko]] || [[word:jubachjechoko|jubachjechoko]] || [[word:shubachjechoko|shubachjechoko]] || [[word:kubachjechoko|kubachjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubachjechoko|thubachjechoko]] || [[word:jubachjechoko|jubachjechoko]] || [[word:shubachjechoko|shubachjechoko]] || [[word:kubachjechoko|kubachjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebachjechoko|thebachjechoko]] || [[word:jebachjechoko|jebachjechoko]] || [[word:shebachjechoko|shebachjechoko]] || [[word:kebachjechoko|kebachjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobachjechoko|thothobachjechoko]] || [[word:jojobachjechoko|jojobachjechoko]] || [[word:shoshobachjechoko|shoshobachjechoko]] || [[word:kokobachjechoko|kokobachjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobachjechoko|thobachjechoko]] || [[word:jobachjechoko|jobachjechoko]] || [[word:shobachjechoko|shobachjechoko]] || [[word:kobachjechoko|kobachjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobachjechoko|thobachjechoko]] || [[word:jobachjechoko|jobachjechoko]] || [[word:shobachjechoko|shobachjechoko]] || [[word:kobachjechoko|kobachjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bachjechoko|th忙bachjechoko]] || [[word:j忙bachjechoko|j忙bachjechoko]] || [[word:sh忙bachjechoko|sh忙bachjechoko]] || [[word:k忙bachjechoko|k忙bachjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabachjechoko|thathabachjechoko]] || [[word:jajabachjechoko|jajabachjechoko]] || [[word:shashabachjechoko|shashabachjechoko]] || [[word:kakabachjechoko|kakabachjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabachjechoko|thabachjechoko]] || [[word:jabachjechoko|jabachjechoko]] || [[word:shabachjechoko|shabachjechoko]] || [[word:kabachjechoko|kabachjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabachjechoko|thabachjechoko]] || [[word:jabachjechoko|jabachjechoko]] || [[word:shabachjechoko|shabachjechoko]] || [[word:kabachjechoko|kabachjechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
